name: session-handoff
description: >- Synthesizes the current session into a structured HANDOFF block for context transfer between sessions. Captures what was built, decisions made, and unresolved items.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它能把当前会话提炼成结构化交接文档，记录工作进度、决策和待办，解决跨会话切换时上下文丢失的问题，适合需要无缝传递工作进度的场景。
